title: Faster Happy Ghasts
description: This mod makes Happy Ghasts faster!
body:
This mod is pretty simple, it just makes the Happy Ghasts faster because they're awfully slow.

The mod makes the happy ghasts riding speed faster only.

If you could just download this mod i made it so i can put it on aternos but i need it to be pretty popular, if you do thanks!

[💎 Support me](https://ko-fi.com/dani_dev)

### Dependencies:
This mod requires the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) if you're downloading the fabric version!
